name: IMG_4016_seg01
description: A golfer walks alone across a green fairway bordered by dense trees on a bright, sunny day.
useCases: background for lifestyle or values messaging
visual metaphor for journey, growth, or focus
intro or outro b-roll for calming transitions
avoidWhen: discussing urban life or office environments
content focused on financial data or direct business topics
qualityNotes: Stable framing with ample natural light; no visible faces; overall gentle motion adds tranquility.

name: IMG_4016_seg02
description: A young child walks up a grassy hill near a golf green with trees in the background.
qualityNotes: Well-lit frame, vertical orientation, gentle motion, no distracting elements.

name: IMG_4016_seg03
description: A person stands alone on a sunny, well-manicured golf green bordered by lush trees.
avoidWhen: focusing on finances or data explicitly
qualityNotes: Natural lighting, vertical framing, subject is small in the frame, background is uncluttered.

name: IMG_7435_seg01
description: A black SUV drives through a stone-lined tunnel toward bright daylight.
qualityNotes: Vertical, good contrast from tunnel darkness to bright exit; slight motion blur from car movement.

name: IMG_7435_seg02
description: A winding road curves along a rocky landscape with large, sunlit red cliffs and a clear blue sky.
useCases: visual metaphor for a journey or progress
branding visuals emphasizing growth or exploration
avoidWhen: urban or office themes are needed
qualityNotes: Vertical framing with good natural lighting; steady motion with clear, unobstructed landscape view.

name: IMG_7435_seg03
description: A winding road curves through a sunlit canyon with tall rock formations and clear blue sky.
useCases: visual metaphor for journey or planning
qualityNotes: Shot is stable with bright natural light; vertical orientation may limit use for widescreen formats.

name: IMG_7722_seg01
description: View from a boat moving quickly on a large lake, with water splashing in the foreground and distant hills under a clear blue sky.
useCases: metaphor for journey or forward movement
avoidWhen: focusing on financial topics without clear metaphor
qualityNotes: Crisp outdoor lighting, energetic water motion; horizon is slightly low for heavier sky emphasis.

name: IMG_3704_seg01
description: Tall marble columns in a grand architectural exterior with one person walking in the distance.
useCases: background texture for guiding clients through foundational concepts
visual metaphor for stability or longevity
intro/outro frames for thought leadership content
avoidWhen: discussing modern technology or digital tools
topics requiring images of home, office, or finance
appealing to a highly casual or playful audience
qualityNotes: Strong vertical framing complements the grandeur; lighting is natural and soft, person adds scale without distraction.

name: IMG_6797-2_seg01
description: A group of horses stands in a shallow river with reeds and greenery along the banks under a partly cloudy sky.
useCases: background for blog posts on balance or tranquility
metaphor for teamwork or harmony in presentations
avoidWhen: requiring direct money or office imagery
qualityNotes: Good natural lighting and calm composition; vertical framing restricts widescreen use, no people present which limits direct personalization.

name: IMG_7293_seg01
description: A dramatic vertical shot of towering red rock cliffs set against a partly cloudy blue sky.
useCases: visual metaphor for strength or longevity in content
setting a calm and reflective tone in branding videos
avoidWhen: discussing specific financial tools or products
any context needing direct wealth imagery or urban aesthetics
qualityNotes: Strong natural lighting and steady composition, but landscape feels generic without connection to finance or brand themes.

name: IMG_7436_seg01
description: A sunlit roadway curves past striking red rock cliffs against a blue sky.
avoidWhen: context demands financial, office, or client imagery
message requires clear connection to wealth management
content must be urban or business-focused
qualityNotes: Well-lit with vivid colors; vertical framing may limit its versatility in standard formats.

name: IMG_6550_seg01
description: A horse stands in a calm river near tall grass, viewed from the perspective of a paddleboard, with mountains under a clear blue sky in the background.
useCases: visual metaphor for journey or exploration
qualityNotes: Well-framed with natural light and stable vertical orientation; no people visible so focus is on environment.

name: IMG_7434_seg01
description: A paved road leads through a scenic canyon with tall red rock formations under a blue sky.
qualityNotes: Vertical framing, steady shot, vibrant natural lighting, no people present.
